config.title: Schemat naliczeń #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50222" #include "50200" #include "50101"
'std_choose_schematnal_hli #include "50630"
function fopen #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
function c##CTRLID_VBCODE##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,pCmdList) 'TODO: see insert_phrase 'TODO: pCmdList.addseparator 'TODO: dim pHLI : set pHLI = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='insert_phrase'") 'TODO: pHLI.prop(1) = cstr("ala") 'TODO: pCmdList.addcommand "ala", pHLI end function
function insert_phrase(byref pHLI) 'TODO: engine musi udostępniać coś takiego: page_.ctrl(CTRLID_VBCODE).getcaretpos end function
SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_SKLADNIKNALICZEN_PARAM(CTRLID_PARAM1,curParam1,pJednostkaParam1) SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE_DATAENTER(CTRLID_PARAM1,page_.root.listSkladnik,curParam1,1)
SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_SKLADNIKNALICZEN_PARAM(CTRLID_PARAM2,curParam2,pJednostkaParam2) SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE_DATAENTER(CTRLID_PARAM2,page_.root.listSkladnik,curParam2,2)

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXE_LABEL_REQ(Nazwa)
QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN)
QXR_EDIT_FIELD_REQ(Kod,-1,8,strKod,RCELL_SPAN)
QXR_EDIT_REF_REQ(Grupa schematów,-1,30,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PLGRUPASCHEMNAL,pGrupaSchemNal,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(Aktywny,1)
eRodzaj
Aktywny Nieaktywny
XFOPTMULTILINEFIELD(CTRLID_OPIS,Opis,FORM_SPAN,strOpis)
QXS_BEGIN_REQ(SECID_KOD,Definicja,FORM_SPAN) QXR_INT_FIELD(Priorytet,CTRLID_PRIORYTET,3,nPriorytet,RCELL_SPAN)
QXR_EDIT_REF_REQ(Termin naliczenia,-1,20,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TERMINNAL,pTerminNal,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(Parametr 1,1)
cConfParam1
Potwierdzaj
QXE_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,13,2,,curParam1,)
QXE_EDIT_REF(-1,SIZE_FOR_JEDNOSTKA,pJednostkaParam1,strSkrot,CRSR_DEFAULT) QXE_PICTURE_CHOICE(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA,pJednostkaParam1,strSkrot,CRSR_DEFAULT)
QXC_LABEL(Parametr 2,1)
cConfParam2
Potwierdzaj
QXE_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,13,2,,curParam2,)
QXE_EDIT_REF(-1,SIZE_FOR_JEDNOSTKA,pJednostkaParam2,strSkrot,CRSR_DEFAULT) QXE_PICTURE_CHOICE(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA,pJednostkaParam2,strSkrot,CRSR_DEFAULT)
QXE_MULTILINE_FIELD(CTRLID_VBCODE,20000,9000,strVBCode)
QXS_END_REQ(FORM_SPAN) QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_ELEMENTY,Wzory pomocnicze,FORM_SPAN)
listSkladnik
LP Element
XG_LP_CELL XG_REF_CELL_PLSCHEMNAL
QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
